catalog_content:
Item Name: Ethiopian Coffee, Yirgacheffe Region, USDA Organic, Whole Bean, Kosher, Fresh Roasted, 16-ounce
Bullet Point 1: 100% Pure Ethiopian Coffee Beans - Yirgacheffe, Medium-bodied and brilliantly acidy with rough, fruity or winy tones. Thick body and an earthy aroma coupled with lemon, blueberry and blackberry notes.
Bullet Point 2: TESTED FOR MOLD, QUALITY AND SAFETY: Our coffee undergoes rigorous phytosanitary testing before export and lab analysis upon arrival to check for mycotoxins and mold. We then roasted at over 400°F, this meticulous process guarantees a fresh, safe, and impurity-free coffee experience.
Bullet Point 3: USDA Organic, Medium/Light Roast whole beans allowing the true flavor characteristic to come through for a remarkable taste.
Bullet Point 4: Fresh roasted then immediately packed and sealed to assure freshness.
Bullet Point 5: 100% Customer Satisfaction Guaranteed.
Product Description: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe Coffee is unusual in that the bulk of the crop is gathered from wild coffee trees giving this coffee a truly exotic flavor with pleasant acidity. Medium-bodied and brilliantly acidy with rough, fruity or winy tones. It includes a thick body and an earthy aroma coupled with lemon, blueberry and blackberry notes. Volcanica Coffee is a specialty importer and retailer of exotic gourmet coffee beans that is committed to offering only the finest quality coffee from volcanic regions around the world that are wonderfully exotic and remarkable in taste.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium specialty coffee with USDA Organic and Kosher certifications, positioned as a high-quality, exotic product. The 16 oz whole bean packaging suggests a mid-to-high price point, targeting coffee enthusiasts seeking unique, artisanal flavors. Rigorous quality testing and fresh roasting processes further justify premium pricing.

Item Name: clean100 Special BBQ Liquid Degreaser Spray - 750 ml, 100% Natural, Ecological, Hypoallergenic – Barbecue Grill Cleaner for burned oil
Bullet Point 1: Decisive Cleaning Action: The BBQ cleaner efficiently eliminates baked-on food residues and burned-on grease stains from your grill and is designed to take on even the most brutal oil stains. You spend less time and effort doing it, which frees you up to enjoy your delectable grilled meals.
Bullet Point 2: Safe for the Environment: The barbeque grill cleaner is safe for use even without gloves and mask and created from natural components, ensuring a pleasant and fresh grilling experience. You can confidently clean your grill without fear, as it leaves no gas emissions
Bullet Point 3: Safe for Grills: We understand how important it is to safeguard the surfaces of your grill. Our natural green BBQ cleaner suits various grill surfaces, including stainless steel, cast iron, and porcelain. It cleans chemicals, dirt, and burned food on your grill without scratching or harming it, extending its life.
Bullet Point 4: Easy to Use: BBQ Grill Cleaner comes in a convenient spray bottle for easy application. Simply spray the cleaner onto the grill surfaces, brush and scrub, let it penetrate for 45 seconds, and wipe away the dirt and grease with a cloth. Enjoy a hassle-free cleaning process.
Bullet Point 5: Vegan Bottle: clean100 BBQ Spray Cleaner is made with a biodegradable formula, ensuring a responsible and eco-friendly cleaning experience. You may find no hazardous pictograph on bottle, implying that this formula is safe for all, be it pets, nature, or the surface that needs to be cleaned.
Product Description: clean100 Natural Green BBQ Cleaner is the best way to quickly and easily remove tough grease and baked-on food stains from your cherished BBQ grill. This carefully crafted biodegradable cleaning solution ensures a pleasant grilling experience every time because it is environmentally friendly and odorless. Clean 100 Professional's Barbeque Cleaner's potent formula attacks even the most brutal filth, leaving your grill spotless and prepared for your upcoming backyard barbecue. Bid farewell to laborious scrubbing and welcome to a simple cleaning procedure. This premium cleaning is made for professionals and BBQ enthusiasts and promises outstanding results without sacrificing safety. You can be sure that it is safe for you, your family, and the environment because it lacks dangerous ingredients.
Value: 25.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium eco-friendly cleaning product with a focus on natural ingredients and safety. Positioned as a high-quality solution for BBQ grill maintenance, targeting environmentally conscious consumers. Biodegradable formula and hypoallergenic claims justify a higher price point compared to standard degreasers.
